properties.select_combustivel:
SELECT
CAST("Regiao - Sigla" AS VARCHAR) AS regiao,
CAST("Estado - Sigla" AS VARCHAR) AS estado,
CAST(Municipio AS VARCHAR) AS municipio,
CAST(Revenda AS VARCHAR) AS revenda,
CAST("CNPJ da Revenda" AS VARCHAR) AS cnpj,
CAST(Produto AS VARCHAR) AS produto,

SUBSTRING("Data da Coleta",7,4) || '-' ||
SUBSTRING("Data da Coleta",4,2) || '-' ||
SUBSTRING("Data da Coleta",1,2) AS data_coleta,

CAST(REPLACE("Valor de Venda", ',', '.') AS DECIMAL) AS valor_venda,
CAST(REPLACE("Valor de Compra", ',', '.') AS DECIMAL) AS valor_compra,
CAST(Bandeira AS VARCHAR) AS bandeira

FROM FLOWFILE
